description_long: This is a rectangular, upright refrigerator with a minimalist design, featuring a smooth, light gray exterior. The front face is divided into two sections, indicating a top freezer and a larger bottom refrigerator compartment, each with a subtle seam and small, vertical handles on the left edge. The sides are plain and unadorned, matching the front in color and finish, while the back panel is darker and appears to be made of a different, possibly metallic or composite material. The refrigerator stands on a flat base with no visible feet or wheels. There are no visible brand logos, control panels, or ventilation grilles on the exterior. The overall appearance is utilitarian, suitable for placement in garages, utility rooms, or urban service areas.
description: A tall, rectangular, light gray refrigerator with a two-door front and minimalist design, featuring subtle vertical handles and a plain, unadorned exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two-door design with a visible seam and small vertical handles on the left edge.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, smooth surface with the handles slightly protruding near the front edge.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a darker, textured back panel, contrasting with the lighter sides and front.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, with a plain, smooth surface and no visible handles.
attribute_door_handle_style: Vertical, slightly protruding handles located on the left edge of each door, simple and utilitarian.
